summary: The diff implements the majority of the build requirements. REQ-5 (Radha Krishna theme), REQ-6 (Instagram footer), REQ-7 (Short Kurti backend), REQ-8 (Short Kurtis section), and REQ-9 (product image mapping) are all substantially addressed. However, the hooks directory was modified (useQueries.ts was changed to add useProductsByCategory and useInitializeKurti), which violates the explicit constraint 'Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/'. Additionally, REQ-9 requires actual image files placed in frontend/public/assets/generated but no image files appear in the added files list.

missing_requirements.requirement: Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/ — this is an explicit constraint in the build request
missing_requirements.reason: frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts was modified to add useProductsByCategory, useInitializeKurti, and useInitialize functions. The constraint explicitly forbids editing files under frontend/src/hooks/.

missing_requirements.requirement: Product images from the uploaded photos are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows backend seed data referencing paths like /assets/generated/IMG_4047-1.jpeg and ProductCard rendering those paths, but there is no evidence in the diff that the actual image files were added to frontend/public/assets/generated. No new image files appear in the Added files list.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module added for stable memory migration
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request any backend migration infrastructure. A migration.mo file was added and integrated into main.mo with 'with migration = Migration.run', which was not part of any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Separate initializeGopiProducts and initializeKurtiProducts public backend functions
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specified seeding products but did not specify splitting initialization into two separate public endpoints with sequential calling logic from the frontend.

hallucinated_features.description: ProductCard accentColor prop with dual-mode peacock and lotus styling
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request asked for visually distinct sections but did not specify a dual-mode ProductCard component with an accentColor prop as a specific implementation detail.
